name: Oringinal "Philly" Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs and melted margarine; press the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 325 degrees F for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth, then add sugar, lemon juice, lemon peel, and vanilla. Mix until well blended.
4. Add egg yolks one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
5. Beat the egg whites with a pinch of salt until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the cream cheese mixture.
7. Pour the batter over the crust in the springform pan.
8. Bake at 300 degrees F for 45 minutes, or until set and slightly golden on top.
9. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan, then carefully remove the side of the pan.
10. Chill completely before serving. Top with cherry pie filling or fresh fruit, if desired.
